rationale: Anti-gaming/coverage lens: no leg is papered over. All AC1-AC13 map to exactly one bead with a NAMED runnable proof (Provenance parity-checked against the spec's Acceptance Criteria — none dropped, none double-owned, none mapped to an un-named proof). R1's four detection concerns each have a home+proof: probe fail-OPEN (AC2d TestApproveImpl_DeletedBranchNoRefusal), the three cleanly-signalled fail-CLOSED legs via the ScanOrphanedClosedBeads error-core (AC1b + lifecycle TestScanOrphanedClosedBeads_ErrorPreserving), the Option-B worktree-enum leg (AC13), and R3 obligation (AC6). Verified in code that the Option-B leg keys off bead.WorktreeList() — the SAME source defaultWorktreeOps.List() feeds FinalizeEpic (mindspec_executor.go:44-46 -> bead.WorktreeList; :383 consumes it), so a transient BranchExists miss can't hide a merge candidate; the fail-CLOSED-on-own-infra asymmetry vs FinalizeEpic's merge-SKIP is explicit (Bead 2 step 3), and the two-List() residual is disclosed honestly. No-behavior-change claims hold: the trickiest — FindOrphanedClosedBeads byte-identity on a MIXED error+later-orphan list — is explicitly flagged and test-pinned, not glossed. Executor AC8 is truly comment-only (one occurrence, zero logic). Recovery is honest: R3 branch-less names the restoration-prerequisite (complete.go:492 merge-base death confirmed), never a bare failing command. Negative fences 0-hit, gitutil diff empty, all new test names absent (proofs RED now), exports absent. Fail directions all correct.

findings.note: AC1-AC13 each have exactly one bead home with a named runnable proof matching the spec's named proof. R1 (4 legs), R2 (AC5), R3 (AC6) all covered. Provenance table cross-checks clean against the spec's ACs.

Verified defaultWorktreeOps.List() delegates to bead.WorktreeList() (executor:44-46); FinalizeEpic consumes it at :383; Bead 2 step 3 keys implWorktreeListFn off the same source and epic-scopes via ClosedEpicBeadIDs (the SAME findEpicBySpecIDFn+listClosedBeadsFn pair the orphan scan uses, so the two enumerations cannot disagree). Fail-CLOSED-on-own-infra asymmetry stated. Two-List() residual carried honestly in step 3 + Non-Goals, not overclaimed.

Wrapper byte-identity is the real gaming risk (a naive orphans,_:=core() would drop later orphans after a mid-loop ancestry error). The plan explicitly demands mixed-list parity and pins it with TestScanOrphanedClosedBeads_ErrorPreserving; implementable via a core that accumulates orphans while recording the first infra error. complete reconcile re-expressed over the extracted CheckPendingObligations with no semantic complete test change. Executor AC8 confirmed comment-only (grep shows single 'rule as CompleteBead' occurrence; zero logic touched).

Detection legs fail-CLOSED (leg1 refuses on epic-lookup/bd-list/ancestry error); BranchExists probe fail-OPEN by design (AC2d); worktree-enum fail-CLOSED on own infra (deliberate asymmetry); R3 corrupt-plan fail-CLOSED (unlike gate-1/3 silent :226-227 skip). All directions correct.

R3 branch-less recourse names restore-branch-ref THEN complete, because a bare complete dies at complete.go:492 step-3.5 merge-base (anchor confirmed). AC6(a) pins the restoration prerequisite. Orphan/worktree-enum recovery lines are always-runnable (branch demonstrably exists).

Edge 2->1 real (Bead 2 consumes 4 Bead-1 exports, none exist at HEAD; AC4 anchor greps ScanOrphanedClosedBeads introduced by Bead 1). Bead 3 depends_on:[] honest (ownership claim already committed at workflow/OWNERSHIP.yaml:9 sole claimant; AC9/AC10 consume no produced state). Chain=2, within <=3.

Verified impl.go:249 MergeBase, :226-227 planErr skip, :310 adrResult, :372 FinalizeEpic, :452 readPlanBeadIDs, :140 EnsureMigrated, call-order doc :114-131; orphans.go seams :28/:29/:40 + :95 + :54 RecoveryCommand + :74 wrapper; executor :383/:385 + comment; bdcli WorktreeList:202; worktree.go:21 BeadBranchPrefix; panel_advisory :295/:310/:329/:519/:624. All resolve.

All 8 spot-checked new test names 0-hit at HEAD; four exports absent; negative fence (BranchExistsE, show-ref) 0-hit; git diff main -- internal/gitutil empty. AC10 grep-l one-liner correctly demoted to non-discriminating pin (ownership already GREEN); discriminating proof is the new absent test.

complete does NOT import approve (only a comment mention) -> approve->complete edge acyclic; approve currently imports only internal/bead; gitutil/lifecycle are leaves. ADR-0030 clean (no executor seam, OQ4 no-seam). ADR-0037 amendment is reach-extension. No cross-bead file collision (orphans_test.go vs ownership_test.go disjoint).
